summary: 3 potential race conditions, 5 N+1 query patterns, 2 blocking I/O calls in async handlers. No thread safety issues (single-threaded runtime).

race_conditions.description: Checks stock quantity then decrements without locking -- concurrent requests can oversell

async_issues.description: Synchronous file.read() inside async request handler blocks the event loop
send_email() is async but called without await -- email silently not sent

memory_leak_risks.description: Dict-based cache with no eviction policy or size limit

resource_leaks.description: Connection acquired in try block but not released in except/finally path

recommendations.title: Fix race condition in inventory service
recommendations.description: Use SELECT FOR UPDATE or optimistic locking for stock management

recommendations.title: Add eager loading for User.orders
recommendations.description: Use prefetch_related('orders') to eliminate N+1 query
